camera.title: Camera Permission Required
camera.message: We need camera access to record videos. Please grant permission in your device settings.

microphone.title: Microphone Permission Required
microphone.message: We need microphone access to record audio in your videos. Please grant permission in your device settings.

mediaLibrary.title: Media Library Permission Required
mediaLibrary.message: We need access to your media library to save videos. Please grant permission in your device settings.
